---
title: "The First International Conference on Lectometry"
site: distill::distill_website
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(leaflet)
library(DT)
library(hms)

opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

```

Background: Phonological distances between Eurasian lects measured based on Phonotacticon 1.0 (Joo & Hsu 2025). Redder color represents closer distance.

# About

The **First International Conference on Lectometry** (LectoConf1) is a conference dedicated to the art of measuring distance (the quantifiable degree of dissimilarity) between lects (linguistic varieties).

# Plenary speakers

 * [**Szeto** Pui Yiu](https://pyszeto.wixsite.com/home) (University of Hong Kong)
 * [Hedvig **Skirgård**](https://sites.google.com/site/hedvigskirgard) (Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology)

# Call for papers
